title: opilia campestris var. glabra
intro: Opilia campestris var. glabra is a shrub species native to various tropical regions, specifically in the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Opiliaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues such as fever, skin conditions, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Opilia campestris var. glabra include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and providing relief from pain and discomfort. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often made by boiling the roots or leaves in water to extract its medicinal properties.
